description: Auto-invocation is DISABLED. PromptCoach runs only when the user explicitly invokes a skill: /prompt-analyzer:analyze-prompt (live coaching) or /prompt-analyzer:prompt-report (session summary). To re-enable coaching on every prompt, restore the UserPromptSubmit hook shown in the commented block below and set auto_observe:true in .prompt-analyzer/config.json.

hooks.command: printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT" | grep -q '^\*' && exit 0; printf '<system-reminder>PromptCoach is active. Before addressing the task, run the analyze-prompt skill on the prompt above: classify its stage, score it, update ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.prompt-analyzer/${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}.json, and show the Analysis Window + coaching. A prompt starting with * is exempt.</system-reminder>'
